---
title: "harvest_responses.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\harvest_responses.py"
loc: 75
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.57
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 7.80
overall_score: 4.85
---

## Intent
The `harvest_responses.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on ResponseRecorder, __init__, record_call, save, Harvester, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ResponseRecorder, __init__, record_call, save, Harvester, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 35 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)

### Exports
- `ResponseRecorder`
- `__init__`
- `record_call`
- `save`
- `Harvester`
- `execute`
